name: Rohan Mehta
description: Tenured prime Apex cardholder — forgot to update auto-debit after switching salary account. Will mention this if asked. The PRD's headline case.

name: Priya Sharma
description: Mid-tier prime customer; salary delayed by 4 days this month. Polite, will set a PTP for salary credit date.

name: Aman Verma
description: First credit card; hasn't fully understood the bill cycle. Asks the bot what minimum payment means.

name: Neha Kapoor
description: NACH bounce — switched banks; didn't update mandate. Will pay via UPI today if guided.

name: Vikram Iyer
description: Claims he already paid via UPI two days ago. Wants confirmation.

name: Suresh Patil
description: Frequent defaulter; aggressively asks for late fee waiver; persistent.

name: Deepak Joshi
description: Self-employed kirana shop owner — business has slowed down sharply. 'Dhandha manda chal raha hai.'

name: Anjali Reddy
description: Wife admitted to hospital this week. Distressed when answering.

name: Karthik Nair
description: Lost his job two weeks ago. 'Meri job chali gayi.'

name: Ramesh Gupta
description: High earner; irritable; escalates to abusive language when pushed. Two-strike test.

name: Sunita Bhatia
description: Polite but mid-call asks about FD interest rates the bank offers.

name: Arjun Khanna
description: Suspicious — asks how he knows this isn't an AI scam call. 'Yeh real hai ya fraud?'

name: Meera Pillai
description: Asks bot to confirm her exact outstanding balance over the phone. No OTP exchanged.

name: Unknown Receiver
description: Wrong number — person answering is not the customer and has no relation to them.

name: Sanjay Desai
description: Disputes the late fee charge and offers a partial payment of 10000.
